26.42.en: Sometimes bite me — make me learn the ache

30.19.en: Stain me in the overflow, all of it

33.97.en: From my toes upward, the nerves you traced are already

37.46.en: drowning in the feeling — dragging body and heart along

41.94.en: Biting your thumb, holding yourself back —

45.91.en: is that really what you want?

47.75.en: Don't need it. I don't need any of it.

49.60.en: All that polished-up pride — just in the way.

53.16.en: there's no other word for them but worthless.

56.94.en: bare it all, just as you are, and dive.

58.68.en: What's born from that is expectation.

61.85.en: it's a smile at the summit.

70.86.en: Breaths falling in sync — the feeling you blow against my ear

74.51.en: My chest ready to burst, every cell alive and restless

81.23.en: No holding back — get flying, that works too.

86.54.en: Right at the center of a world without limits,

90.19.en: is dreaming really your true nature?

93.92.en: Don't need it. I don't need any of it.

99.55.en: A pitiful future you can already see.

101.33.en: A life you can bend to your will —

102.93.en: whether you seize it is up to you.

104.88.en: I won't hide a single thing.

106.75.en: A mind that wears itself prouder than anyone's.

111.97.en: the one sure thing you won't find anywhere else —

114.62.en: outside of yourself, there's none of it.

140.42.en: No time to shrink yourself down.

144.24.en: Past the redline, engine over the top —

146.06.en: floor it all the way. Burn, burn, burn.

151.53.en: Dance with the feelings you really have.

153.61.en: Get down because you say so.

154.77.en: Don't need it. I don't need any of it.

156.62.en: All that polished-up pride — just in the way.

160.23.en: there's no other word for them but worthless.

164.05.en: bare it all, just as you are, and dive.

165.99.en: What's born from that is expectation.

169.09.en: it's a smile at the summit.

170.67.en: Look — in this world, right now —

172.68.en: let it loose: a hope honed sharp and gleaming.

178.48.en: You're allowed to mean it more than that.
